ddls:
CREATE TABLE "autonomous_bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "battery_life" INTEGER /* Battery life of the bike in minutes */,
  "pickup_speed" REAL /* Pickup speed of the bike in meters per second */,
  "num_autonomous_bikes" INTEGER /* Number of bikes currently autonomous */,
  "current_location" TEXT /* Current location of the bike */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date of manufacture */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent managing the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance data record */,
  "cycle" INTEGER /* Cycle number for tracking metrics over time */,
  "time_recorded" TEXT /* Time when the data was recorded */,
  "traditional_scenario" INTEGER /* Indicates if the scenario was traditional */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike for which the data was recorded */,
  "distance_traveled" REAL /* Distance traveled by the bike in meters */,
  "battery_percentage" REAL /* Battery percentage at the time of data recording */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the bike in meters per second */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent managing the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES autonomous_bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agent_info ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., rider, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Last time the user was active */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pickup_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pickup request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike being requested for pickup */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "pickup_location" TEXT /* Location where the pickup was requested */,
  "dropoff_location" TEXT /* Location where the bike was dropped off */,
  "distance_traveled" REAL /* Distance traveled for the pickup request */,
  "user_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user for the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pickup_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pickup_requests_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES autonomous_bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location record */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike for which the location is recorded */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the location was recorded */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the bike's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the bike's location */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the bike at the recorded location */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction the bike is heading */,
  "traffic_conditions" TEXT /* Traffic conditions at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_locations_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES autonomous_bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date for the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* List of parts replaced during maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES autonomous_bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agent_info ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery status record */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike for which the battery status is recorded */,
  "battery_percentage" REAL /* Current battery percentage of the bike */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the battery status was checked */,
  "charging_status" TEXT /* Current charging status (e.g., charging, not charging) */,
  "last_charge_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the last charge in minutes */,
  "average_charge_time" INTEGER /* Average charge time in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_status_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES autonomous_bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_info" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent managing the bike */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the agent (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the agent joined the system */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Last time the agent was active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the city */,
  "number_of_bikes_deployed" INTEGER /* Number of bikes deployed in the city */,
  "average_travel_distance" REAL /* Average travel distance in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_bike_data" (
  "city_bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city-bike relationship */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the bike is deployed */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike deployed in the city */,
  "total_distance_traveled" REAL /* Total distance traveled by the bike in the city */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the bike in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_bike_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_bike_data_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES autonomous_bikes ("bike_id")
)
